title.en: Voice Command API - Talk to Your Task List
title.es: Voice Command API - Habla con tu Lista de Tareas

description.en: Build a FastAPI backend for a voice-first to-do app: implement in-memory CRUD task endpoints, a POST /instruction endpoint that returns strict routing JSON from plain text, and a POST /transcribe endpoint that converts audio to text and reuses instruction routing logic.
description.es: Construye un backend en FastAPI para una app de tareas controlada por voz: implementa endpoints CRUD en memoria, un endpoint POST /instruction que devuelva JSON de enrutamiento estricto desde texto plano, y un endpoint POST /transcribe que convierta audio a texto y reutilice la logica de routing.

sharing.en: I just completed Voice Command API - Talk to Your Task List with LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Built POST /transcribe + POST /instruction routing and in-memory task CRUD with FastAPI. Check it out: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/voice-command-api #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #python #fastapi #restapi
sharing.es: Acabo de completar Voice Command API - Habla con tu Lista de Tareas con LearnPack @4GeeksAcademy. Construí POST /transcribe + routing con POST /instruction y CRUD en memoria con FastAPI. Mira el proyecto: https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/voice-command-api #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #python #fastapi #restapi

sharing.en: Built and shipped: Voice Command API. Learning by building with @4GeeksAcademy - speech-to-text to routing JSON and task actions in FastAPI. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/voice-command-api #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #python #fastapi #llm
sharing.es: Construido y publicado: Voice Command API. Aprendiendo con proyectos reales en @4GeeksAcademy - de speech-to-text a JSON de routing y acciones de tareas con FastAPI. https://github.com/4GeeksAcademy/voice-command-api #AIEngineering #LearnPack #4GeeksAcademy #python #fastapi #llm
